display.purpose: Serif font for H1s, titles, and main headings.

body.purpose: Monospace font for all research prose and copy.

label.purpose: Monospace font for metadata, tags, and small captions.

motion.name: ease-settle
motion.purpose: Standard easing curve for all entrance motions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard sharp flat primary action button.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #0e8268; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 0px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 250ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #085e4b; }

components.name: Article Card
components.description: Dashed border article snippet card with hover state.
components.html:
No. 001 · Alam5 mnt

Api Biru Kawah Ijen

Laporan riset geologi tentang fenomena api biru di kawah Gunung Ijen, Jawa Timur.

21 Jun 2026High
components.css: .ds-article-card { border: 1px dashed rgba(14, 130, 104, 0.7); background-color: #ffffff; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 0px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 250ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-article-card:hover { background-color: #e9f6f1; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-label { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #33373d; } .ds-read-time { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #33373d; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 12px 0; color: #0e8268; } .ds-article-card:hover .ds-card-title { text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-card-summary { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #33373d; margin: 0 0 16px 0; flex-grow: 1; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(14, 130, 104, 0.4); padding-top: 12px; } .ds-date { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: #33373d; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 1px dashed rgba(14, 130, 104, 0.6); background-color: #ffffff; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #085e4b; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; background-color: #2dd4a7; display: inline-block; }

narrative.overview: NaLI by NatIve's design system evokes the tactile, rigorous feel of a physical archival folder, open-science field report, or academic journal printed with high-quality green-teal ink on raw white paper. The layout emphasizes structure, documentation, and high credibility.
keyCharacteristics: Flat & Sharp: Absolute omission of rounded corners and box-shadows.
Teal Monoculture: Primary colors are strictly derived from the teal ink spectrum, contrasting against pure paper backgrounds.
Archive Taxonomy: Uses structural indicators like dashed borders, index numbering, and confidence labels to present articles as verified research files.

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: Only one accent color family (Teal) is allowed. Accent colors outside this ramp (except for standard validation indicators) are prohibited.

rules.name: The Ink-Wash Contrast Rule
rules.body: Highlight layers must use a transparency of the primary ink (Ink Wash) or a direct background shade. Gray-scale hover backgrounds on tinted paper are prohibited.

rules.name: The Monospace Prose Rule
rules.body: All body copy and prose must be set in monospace (IBM Plex Mono) to emphasize the research-journal character. Proportional sans-serif body copy is forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat Print Rule
rules.body: All cards, dropdowns, and components must lie flat on the paper surface. Depth is represented using borders, background tints, or horizontal lines, never with shadows or blurs.

dos: Do use dashed borders for borders and section dividers.
Do set all interactive buttons and cards to a sharp 0px border-radius.
Do preserve body text length within 68ch to maintain high readability.
Do apply a duotone teal filter on photography to maintain a cohesive editorial visual style.
donts: Don't use card drop shadows or blurred glassmorphism.
Don't use proportional sans-serif fonts for body prose.
Don't use decorative side-stripe border accents on cards or alerts.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows as generic kickers on every single section. Only use metadata subtitles when they convey literal taxonomy.
